item.title: Jimmy Gomez (D) highlighted data from the nonpartisan Joint Committee on Taxation indicating that by 2031, individuals earning less than $15,000 annually would experience a 74.3% increase in federal taxes.
item.description:
While those earning between $15,000 and $30,000 would see a 20.6% increase. Gomez stated, “You have no shame when it comes to hurting working men and women in this country.”
Keep it up, Congressman Gomez. We need to hear more voices like yours. https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=60lPtsMXzSo

item.title: Ugh…
item.description:
Habeas corpus is a legal procedure, meaning "you shall have the body," that ensures individuals cannot be held without just cause and that their detention is lawful. It's a judicial mandate requiring a prisoner to be brought before a court to determine if their detention is legal. This writ is crucial for protecting individual liberty and preventing the abuse of state power. US Constitution Article I, Section 9, Clause 2: The Privilege of the Writ of Habeas Corpus shall not be suspended, unless when in Cases of Rebellion or Invasion the public Safety may require it. https://constitution.congress.gov/browse/essay/artI-S9-C2-1/ALDE_00001087/
These people have done NOTHING wrong. They are legal migrants, illegally deported. Every right violated against one person violates all the rights of all others. https://www.bbc.com/news/articles/cwynl8jv4gjo
Your boss or colleague could have you arrested by a buddy in the police force or by ICE for some BS charge. You’re now guilty, not even until proven innocent, because you won’t get the chance to prove your innocence. RESIST…like your life depends on it.
item.dc:creator: killbillsexwife

item.dc:creator: OceansRust
fulcrims

item.title: Inside Chernobyl power plant, there is a black fungus called Cladosporium sphaerospermum.
item.description: This fungus is doing the physically impossible and feeding off deadly Gamma Radiation and using it to power itself through a process called radiosynthesis, its using melanin to convert that deadly radiation into chemical energy, basically powering its growth in a place where nothing should survive. Think of it like a plant doing photosynthesis, but instead of sunlight, it’s thriving on nuclear radiation. It’s not just surviving, it’s growing toward the radiation, like it’s craving it. It has even changed its melanin type to speed up energy production when exposed to radiation. Even a Ukrainian fungus is tough as fuck. https://www.rsb.org.uk/biologist-features/eating-gamma-radiation-for-breakfast
item.dc:creator: vladrichdemaclant

item.title: What Happened Today #110
item.description: ? Every Trump policy comes with its opposite. They deport legal immigrants while claiming to target criminals. They dismantle surveillance oversight after condemning it. They promise billion-dollar defense systems with no plans. They say "don’t fuck around with Medicaid" while pushing laws that gut healthcare. It’s not chaos. It’s the familiar pattern of public theater and private demolition of democratic guardrails. Do something about it, but first call your rep and senators to tell them you do not want them to support Trump's budget bill. Meanwhile, don't rely on the algorithm. Let me send this to you every night, free and private, so you never miss what's going on. Add your email at https://www.govbrief.today #GovBriefToday #Resist 1. https://go.govbrief.today/south-sudan-deportation 2. https://go.govbrief.today/noem-habeas-corpus 3. https://go.govbrief.today/senate-tips-tax 4. https://go.govbrief.today/house-trump-bill 5. https://go.govbrief.today/long-irs-confirmation 6. https://go.govbrief.today/golden-dome-175billion 7. https://go.govbrief.today/fbi-surveillance-compliance 8. https://go.govbrief.today/doj-investigating-cuomo 9. https://go.govbrief.today/scotus-libby-maine 10. https://go.govbrief.today/tsa-privatization-hearing 11. https://go.govbrief.today/faa-reduces-newark-flights 12. https://go.govbrief.today/mciver-toolkit Yesterday's Top Story: https://go.govbrief.today/trump-conspiracy-biden-cancer
item.dc:creator: GeorgeBounacos

item.dc:creator: Joyika

item.title: Ladies of Imgur, do you have the same experience ?
item.description: So sick of that. It's always the same. We have nice chats, we connect on many hobbies and interests, we give each other news for a while. Then I mention I have someone in my life and.... Beeeeeep........ Nobody on the other end of the line. It makes me feel unvalued as a human being. I feel like, if I were a man, it would be easier to make friends on this app. I've been on Imgur since years, and I never made a friend, ever. Everytime I end up being ghosted by someone who only saw me as a potential vagina, and never as an individual with similar passions in life. It's okay to want different things. You don't have to be a dick about it and ghost me like a coward. I know a lot of people are struggling with making friends. I just feel like, if you're a woman, you're playing hardcore mode. Anyway, just screaming at the void, feel free to downvote.
item.dc:creator: LuuzSanLyra

item.title: All These Years Later, This Is More Relevant Than Ever - Snow Tha Product: "Immigrants (We Get the Job Done)"
item.description: Snow Tha Product, the stage name of Claudia Alexandra Madriz Meza, is a Mexican American rapper and singer from San Jose, California. In November 2016, Snow contributed to The Hamilton Mixtape, joining rappers K'naan, Riz MC, and Residente on the track "Immigrants (We Get the Job Done)". The music video for the song was released on June 28, 2017. In August 2017, the song won Snow and her collaborators an MTV Video Music Award in the category of Best Fight Against the System. #music #awesome #current_events #mildly_interesting
item.dc:creator: OceansRust

item.title: Carefully Curated Crap, Vol. 490

1
2

6 Pickle!
7
8 Don't know how accurate this is.
9

16
17
18
19 Before anyone freaks out about her hand, old people have super thin skin so it bruises and tears easily. Happens to my mom all the time.
20
21
22
23 Every time.
24
25
Man Tax: Mario Ermito “Weeds are flowers, too, once you get to know them.” ― A.A. Milne Can I make a suggestion? Instead of picking out the one thing in this post that you don't like, and correcting it or complaining about it, comment about something you did like? Seems like half the comments are usually like that. Don't kill our vibe, man.
item.dc:creator: MemeMuseumCurator

item.title: Don’t let your memes be dreams
item.description:
First things first, let’s establish the tone of tonight’s dump
Surprise, it’s depression!
I’ve just been miserable lately
And tired
And since I’m so miserable and tired I stay up super late.
Which makes me more miserable and tired
I also feel like I never have time to do anything
And I never get anything done
Check a look at my dog, her name is Venus
